title: callista gouldii
intro: Callista gouldii, also known as the Australian hawthorn or bush hawthorn, is a small, shrub-like plant native to Australia. It is often used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Callista gouldii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, among others. Callista gouldii is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made from the leaves, flowers, and fruits of the plant.
